emails.subject: Cornhusker
emails.body: Hi Darrin, This is what Mark McCoy sent me about the Cornhusker Deal. Please review and if there is anything else that Rita Wynne or I need to know about this deal, just shoot me an e-mail! Thanks for calling me back! Happy Thanksgiving, Kathy Forwarded by Katherine Benedict/HOU/ECT on 11/22/2000 11:19 AM Mark McCoy@ENRON 11/22/2000 08:12 AM

emails.subject: Re: Cornhusker
emails.body: Re: Cornhusker If you need it, I've got a contract brief that lists the transport cost and fuel from each location (there numerous receipt points). It is possible that we may need to purchase extra gas for the plant on occasion. In that case, we can use the same transport contract on Lone Star and transport on other pipes also. Any expense we incur to deliver gas to the plant will be passed on to the plant. If you have any questions, let me know. D Katherine Benedict 11/22/2000 11:23 AM
